Requitement Specialist at Nityo Infotech

We are hiring for an #AI/ML Engineer position. Interested candidates can send their resumes to #reshma.d@nityo.com.

Position Details:
- Location: Remote
- Type: Contract role

Core AI/ML requirements include:
- Strong experience in Machine Learning, NLP, and Document AI.
- Hands-on expertise with Python, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.
- Knowledge of classical ML and deep learning models.
- Experience in feature engineering for both structured and unstructured data.
- Familiarity with open source and AWS OCR (Textract), document classification, entity extraction, and text summarization.

AWS & UAIS requirements:
- Proven experience deploying ML solutions on AWS.
- Hands-on experience with SageMaker (training, endpoints, monitoring), Textract, Comprehend, and Bedrock.
- Familiarity with United AI Studio (UAIS) pipelines, guardrails, and governance workflows, or a strong ability to ramp up quickly.
